sigWerNormalizedGold: 我 不 再 说
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 我 不 在 乎

sigWerErrors.reason: '再' means 'again' or 'anymore', while '在' means 'at' or 'in'. This substitution changes the meaning of the sentence from 'I will not say (it) again' to 'I am not at (something)', which derails the intended meaning.
